title: Rich Savory Peruvian Beef Lomo Saltado
description: A fatty and comforting Peruvian dish featuring beef, egg rolls, and a mirepoix base, served in a kadhai, this lomo saltado is a perfect blend of flavors and textures. It is also ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a kadhai over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the kadhai and set aside.
Add the chopped onion, tomato, and bell pepper to the kadhai and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the kadhai and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked beef back into the kadhai and stir to combine with the vegetables and garlic.
Add the soy sauce, salt, and black pepper to the kadhai and stir to combine.
Add the egg rolls to the kadhai and stir to combine with the beef and vegetables.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the egg rolls are heated through.
